props.covers: The theme domain: packages/canvas/src/theme/ — palette.ts (the closed 10-pick color table and per-role resolvers) and tokens.ts (board surface variables, universal shape stroke width, text hierarchy).

text.insert: Structure shell created 2026-07-10 in the docs-overhaul session; content pass pending. Scope: packages/canvas/src/theme/ — palette.ts (the 10-pick color table and role resolvers) and tokens.ts (board surface variables, universal stroke width, text hierarchy), plus the theme-dispersal story currently smeared across 10-shape-api and the stage doc.
